title: List all books
raw_requirement: The system shall return a JSON array of all books when the client sends GET /api/books.
expected_action: Return 200 OK and a JSON array.

title: Create a valid book
raw_requirement: The system shall create a book when title, author, publicationYear, genre, and availableCopies are submitted to POST /api/books.
conditions: Book payload is syntactically valid JSON
expected_action: Return 201 Created with a generated book id.

title: Get book by existing or missing id
raw_requirement: The system shall return 200 for an existing book id and 404 for a missing book id when GET /api/books/{id} is called.
expected_action: Return the book for existing id; return 404 for missing id.

title: Update existing or missing book
raw_requirement: The system shall update an existing book with PUT /api/books/{id} and reject updates for a missing id.
expected_action: Return 200 with updated book or 404 for missing book.

title: Create a valid member
raw_requirement: The system shall create a member when name, email, phoneNumber, startDate, and endDate are submitted to POST /api/members.
conditions: Member payload is syntactically valid JSON
expected_action: Return 201 Created with a generated member id.

title: Get member by existing or missing id
raw_requirement: The system shall return 200 for an existing member id and 404 for a missing member id when GET /api/members/{id} is called.
expected_action: Return the member for existing id; return 404 for missing id.

title: Update and delete member
raw_requirement: The system shall update and delete existing members, and return 404 when the target member id is missing.
expected_action: Return 200 for update, 204 for delete, and 404 for missing member.

title: Borrow an available book
raw_requirement: The system shall create a borrowing record when an existing member borrows an existing book with availableCopies greater than 0.
expected_action: Return 201, create a borrowing record, set borrowDate and dueDate, and decrement availableCopies by 1.

title: Reject borrow for unavailable book
raw_requirement: The system shall reject a borrow request when the target book has no available copies.
expected_action: Return 400 Bad Request and do not create a borrowing record.

title: Reject borrow for invalid book
raw_requirement: The system shall reject a borrow request when book.id is missing or does not reference an existing book.
data_ranges: book.id: null or missing or unknown positive integer

title: Reject borrow for invalid member
raw_requirement: The system shall reject a borrow request when member.id is missing or does not reference an existing member.
data_ranges: member.id: null or missing or unknown positive integer

title: Return a borrowed book
raw_requirement: The system shall return a borrowed book when PUT /api/return/{recordId} is called for an existing unreturned borrowing record.
expected_action: Return 200 OK, set returnDate, and increment availableCopies by 1.

title: Reject duplicate return
raw_requirement: The system shall reject a return request when the borrowing record has already been returned.

title: List borrowing records
raw_requirement: The system shall return a JSON array of all borrowing records when GET /api/borrowing-records is called.
expected_action: Return 200 OK and a JSON array.

title: Reject malformed JSON request
raw_requirement: The system shall reject malformed JSON request bodies for JSON-based POST and PUT endpoints.
